chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-149 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case. 11-08-2025 Gul Muhammad Janwari, petiotner is present in person. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G and Muhammad Raza Katohar, APG a/w Mushtaque Ali Shah, DSP/SDPO, Rohri and SIP Dhani Bux on behalf of SSP, Sukkur. **** Learned AAG and APG file statements on behalf of SSP, Sukkur (respondent No.2) and DSP/SDPO, Rohri, which are taken on record and copies whereof are provided to the petiotner. DSP/SDPO, Rohri is present and submits that he has conducted re-investigation of the case bearing Crime No.56 of 2025 registered at P.S, Kandhra-Sukkur, under sections 148, 149, 337J, 506/2 & 427 PPC, collected report from Chemical Examiner, Chemical Laboratory Sukkur and result of chemical analysis is that no any poison was detected. Hence, he is of the opinion that the version of complainant of the case regarding throwing poison medicine to his fishpond has not been proved and he will submit final report of case under C-class before the competent Court of law having jurisdiction. After such statement, petitioner, who maintains this petition in person, is satisfied and seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. However, official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Ahmad
